title: Visual Addons
description: A shader adding a few neat visual addons like damage effects or blurring water depending on your swim speed
body: --- ##### A shader for Minecraft adding a few neat visual addons --- # Features: Made for Minecraft 1.21.5 & Iris - ### Damage Effects: - When you take **damage** your screen turns **red** and the graphics get **deformed**. - When you are **low on heath**, the screen also gets more red (depending on how much health is left). It also gets deformed. - ### Water Effects: - The water has a **new** design. It is now more transparent. - Underwater, the **graphics** are **blurred**. The **faster** you swim the more the graphics are blurred. - When you are underwater and **loose air**, your screen gets **darker** and darker (depending on how much air is left). - ### Fog: - There is a basic **fog**. - ### Other: - Entities taking damage no longer have that red effect. - The lower you are on hunger the darker the screen. ## Images: ### New Damage Effects: ![damage1](https://github.com/Qwatrum/visual-addons/blob/master/images/demo%20(15).png?raw=true) ![damage2](https://github.com/Qwatrum/visual-addons/blob/master/images/demo%20(16).png?raw=true) ### New Water: ![water1](https://github.com/qwatrum/visual-addons/blob/master/images/demo%20(2).png?raw=true) ![water2](https://github.com/qwatrum/visual-addons/blob/master/images/demo%20(11).png?raw=true) ### Fog: ![fog](https://github.com/qwatrum/visual-addons/blob/master/images/demo%20(7).png?raw=true) ### No Red Damage Indicator: ![nored](https://github.com/qwatrum/visual-addons/blob/master/images/demo%20(5).png?raw=true)
